children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present in patient_data; generate a unique patient_id; store patient record in patients database; return success with patient_id

constraints.description: Required fields (name, dob, contact, insurance) must be present

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database; check that appointment_time is not in the past; check doctor availability for that time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

constraints.description: Appointment time must not be in the past
Doctor must be available at requested time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record created with unique appointment_id

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

constraints.description: Records must be sorted by date descending

acceptance_criteria.description: All records for patient returned sorted by date

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
children.behavior: Update patient_data fields in patients database; if insurance field is changed, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

global_vars.description: Read current profile and write updates

constraints.description: Insurance change must be validated against external system

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile updated with validated insurance change

governance_notes: Global state conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). No parent operation dropped. Each child's global_vars is a subset of parent's global_vars.
